content.en:
Ye Tian saw these six Supreme Dao Void Demons, and these six Supreme Dao Void Demons naturally noticed Ye Tian as well.

"A heavy Dao realm ant, kill him!"

A Supreme Dao Void Demon shuttled over, ready to kill Ye Tian casually.

These six Supreme Dao Void Demons are not weak, the weakest one is the Triple Peak Dao Realm, and the most powerful one is the Quadruple Peak Dao Realm.

Any Supreme Dao Void Demon Squad must at least have a Quadruple Peak Dao Realm, or even a Fifth Peak Dao Realm.

"Can kill!"

He was ready to annihilate this Supreme Dao Void Demon Squad.

Burst!

The supreme path void demon who shuttled over was directly pierced and killed by Ye Tian's casual shot.

Immediately after, Ye Tian cast the eighth sequence of the Dao Divine Power to the Dao Flow Body Technique, shuttled over in an instant, and killed the other five Supreme Dao Void Demons.

And these five Supreme Dao Void Demons were really shocked, they thought that the Supreme Dao Void Demon just now could solve Ye Tian, and then continued to hurry, but they were killed by Ye Tian of the Dao Realm.

Rumble!!!!

The five Supreme Dao Void Demons shot out in unison and besieged Ye Tian.

But they still underestimated Ye Tian's strength.

Puff puff puff!!

A Famous Dao Void Demon was killed by Ye Tian, and even the Fourfold Dao Void Demon at the peak of the Dao Realm was also hit by Ye Tian's supreme extreme spear technique, and with one blow, one arm was directly shattered.

The Fourfold Dao Void Demon, who was at the peak of the Dao Realm, was terrified, and fled while calling for help.

However, his speed was not as fast as Ye Tian.

Soon, he was killed by Ye Tian in this void.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took away the treasure resources on their bodies one by one and quickly evacuated here.

Not long after Ye Tian left, a figure descended here, and it was a Supreme Dao Void Demon at the peak of the Fivefold Dao Realm.

He took a look and found that the Supreme Dao Void Demon team had been killed, and the enemy had disappeared.

This annoyed him.

......

Another place.

Ye Tian stopped and took a look at the resource treasures he had received this time.

"It's not much, but it's okay, there are some resources that are useful to me!" Ye Tian muttered.

In addition, he killed six Supreme Dao Void Demons, a pseudo-battlefield order, and recorded his exploits.

However, he is not going to exchange it now, and will exchange it after he has killed enough battle exploits.

There is also the gift of the origin of heaven and earth.

He can accept this gift at any time.

"Look at the effect of the gift of heaven and earth. "

Ye Tian's heart moved, and a large number of Heaven and Earth Origin descended and merged into Ye Tian's body, improving his cultivation.

The origin that comes from this gift is very fast to refine.

It didn't take long for him to refine completely.

As for cultivation, it has improved a little, but not much.

"Sure enough, just killing six Supreme Dao Void Demons won't help much, but once you kill a lot of Supreme Dao Void Demons, you will get more gifts from the origin of heaven and earth, and you may be able to quickly ascend to the peak realm of the Dao Realm!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following days, Ye Tian specifically searched for the Supreme Dao Void Demon to hunt.

Gradually, more and more Supreme Void Demons died at his hands.

Of course, he also had bad moments, such as when he encountered the Supreme Dao Void Demon of the Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm, and he didn't even have a chance to escape.

In this case, he will directly disarm the copy body and make the body collapse.

From the point of view of the Supreme Void Demon, this is suicide.

They may find it strange, but they won't dig deeper.

......

Taisu Battle City.

The sixfold pinnacle of Taisu Palace to the Dao realm, the Lord of Longqin Palace, sits here.

At this time.

She had some injuries on her body, the ones she had sustained not long ago when she had fought a sixfold peak supreme void demon.

Airplanes!

A five-fold pinnacle Tai Suwei came to report the situation.

"Tell the Longqin Palace Master, this is the list of recent losses of our Taisu Palace, as well as the approximate losses of the entire third-level battlefield. "

Wow!

A list fell into the hands of the Longqin Palace Master, and she looked at it carefully.

"Taisu Palace has fallen five fifth-fold Dao realms, thirty-two four-fold Dao realms, and more than a hundred triple-to-Dao realms......"

Looking at the shocking figures, she took a deep breath and calmed down.

Other forces also suffered heavy losses, and some foreign support forces were almost wiped out and did not dare to come to support again.

And the small forces of the original True Dao Domain also suffered heavy losses, many of them were destroyed, and even the True Dao Mountain lost tens of thousands of Dao Realms.

But comparatively speaking, the loss of the Supreme Dao Void Demon is much less.

After all, the Supreme Dao Void Demon has a large number of Supreme Dao Demons cannon fodder, and no matter how much they lose, they are not distressed.

"Damn the Infinite Heavenly Palace, the losses are so serious, they still only send some waste, not even a sixfold Venerable to the peak of the Dao Realm. The Longqin Palace Lord said angrily.

If it continues like this, not to mention that other forces can't bear it, even Taisu Palace can't bear it!

"Tell the inform, let those forces withdraw, and narrow the territory ......"

The Longqin Palace Master said helplessly.

She knew exactly what that meant.

In other words, once this is done, countless creatures under the Supreme Dao Realm will be given up and will be devoured by the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

But this is also a helpless move, because it really can't be protected.

Soon after.

A large number of Supreme Dao Realms retreated to the territory of the Taisu Battlefield and the True Dao Mountain, giving up two-thirds of the territory and giving it to the Supreme Dao Void Demons.

As a result, a large number of Void Continents and Worlds were occupied by the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

But even so, the losses of Taisu Palace and other forces are still not small.

Among them, the most nervous is undoubtedly Ye Tian.

He was really afraid that these forces would be defeated, and then completely abandon this third-level battlefield.

When the time comes, he will not die, but the land beyond eternity will surely be destroyed.

Therefore, he had to frantically kill these Supreme Dao Void Demons, and he was also frantically devouring all kinds of resources, just to reach the peak realm of the First Dao Realm as soon as possible.

Before you know it, hundreds of solstice years have passed.

The third-level battlefield has been fought for so long, and the entire battlefield, many continents and voids have been shattered, and the losses are already difficult to calculate.

Of course, there are also some strong people who have risen and become famous.

Since Ye Tian has always been a small fight and does not fight large-scale wars, no one knows about his existence.

On the side of the Dao Void Demon, he knew that there was a strange One Dao Realm, and he killed many of them, but he committed suicide every time.

At first, they didn't suspect it, but later they felt strange and thought that Ye Tian's so-called suicide should be a means of escape, so Ye Tian was wanted and rewarded.

Therefore, on the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, Ye Tian's reputation is not small.

this day.

Ye Tian had already killed a lot of Supreme Dao Void Demons, but he had never accepted the gift of Heaven and Earth, he was ready to accept the gift of Heaven and Earth Origin at one time this time, and hit the peak realm of the Dao.
